Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,264,436Details
International Box Office $9,976,999
Worldwide Box Office $30,241,435
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $135,188
Total $135,188

Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,500,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,323 opening theaters/2,323 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,001,932

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 11th, 2006 (Wide) by Weinstein/Dimension
International Releases: July 20th, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: December 5th, 2006 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for some violent images.
Running Time: 85 minutes
Franchise: Pulse

Subgenre: Supernatural Horror

Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
